logic.IKK: OR(GEQ(nik, theta_t7_nik), GEQ(map3k1, theta_t7_map3k1), GEQ(cot, theta_t7_cot))
logic.PI3K: OR(GEQ(irs1t, theta_t14_irs1t), GEQ(egfr, theta_t14_egfr), GEQ(ras, theta_t14_ras), GEQ(tnfr, theta_t14_tnfr))
logic.STAT1n: OR(GEQ(p38n, theta_t18_p38n), GEQ(STAT11, theta_t18_STAT11), GEQ(erk12n, theta_t18_erk12n))
logic.cfos: OR(GEQ(elk1, theta_t27_elk1), GEQ(p90RSKn, theta_t27_p90RSKn), GEQ(cJUN, theta_t27_cJUN))
logic.elk1: OR(GEQ(p38n, theta_t30_p38n), GEQ(JNK12n, theta_t30_JNK12n), GEQ(erk12n, theta_t30_erk12n))
logic.map3k1: OR(GEQ(rac, theta_t40_rac), GEQ(sitpec, theta_t40_sitpec), GEQ(ras, theta_t40_ras))
logic.mkk4: OR(GEQ(map3k1, theta_t44_map3k1), GEQ(ask1, theta_t44_ask1), GEQ(map3k7, theta_t44_map3k7))
logic.mkk7: OR(GEQ(map3k1, theta_t46_map3k1), GEQ(ask1, theta_t46_ask1), GEQ(map3k7, theta_t46_map3k7))
logic.p38: OR(GEQ(mkk3, theta_t51_mkk3), GEQ(mkk4, theta_t51_mkk4), GEQ(mkk6, theta_t51_mkk6))
logic.p70S6: OR(GEQ(erk12, theta_t54_erk12), GEQ(pdk1, theta_t54_pdk1), GEQ(mTOR, theta_t54_mTOR))
logic.prak: OR(GEQ(erk12, theta_t60_erk12), GEQ(mkk3, theta_t60_mkk3), GEQ(p38, theta_t60_p38))
logic.ras: OR(GEQ(sos, theta_t63_sos), LT(rasgap, theta_t63_rasgap), LT(AKT, theta_t63_AKT))
logic.traf6: OR(LT(a20, theta_t71_a20), GEQ(il1r, theta_t71_il1r), GEQ(tlr4, theta_t71_tlr4))
